backstory.original: A glamorous diva possessed by a Deva, with an inciting voice and gleaming pristine robes, Orisha is the lead vocalist of the Sirens of the Realms, her found family. She is of such great renown, that she needs no last name.
backstory.display: 奥瑞莎是被天人附身的迷人女歌手。她拥有绝佳的嗓音和发光的纯洁长袍，是“海妖国度”的首席主唱。她的名气大到甚至都不需要姓氏。

description.original: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.
description.display: 奥瑞莎召唤火焰射线并将其投向多个随机目标。

longDescription.original: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.
longDescription.display: 奥瑞莎召唤火焰射线并将其投向多个随机目标。

description.original: Orisha eyes light aglow and two angel wings burst from her back. A wave of divine energy surges across the screen damaging all enemies.
description.display: 奥瑞莎的眼睛射出光芒，身后生出一对天使之翼。神圣能量从屏幕上喷涌而过，对所有敌人造成伤害。

longDescription.original: Orisha eyes light aglow and two angel wings burst from her back. A wave of divine energy surges across the screen damaging all enemies.
longDescription.display: 奥瑞莎的眼睛射出光芒，身后生出一对天使之翼。神圣能量从屏幕上喷涌而过，对所有敌人造成伤害。

description.pre: Whenever Orisha uses Radiant Soul, her angel wings burst aflame and Flaming Wings gains $(orisha_max_stacks) stacks. Stacks decay by 1 per second. The damage of Scorching Ray is increased by $(orisha_flaming_buff_base_amount)% plus $(orisha_flaming_buff_stack_amount)% (additive) for every stack remaining. At 0 stacks, her wings and damage bonus are removed. Whenever Orisha gets a kill, the stacks reset to $(orisha_max_stacks), but the decay rate is increased by $(decay_amount)% (multiplicative).

每当奥瑞莎使用光耀之魂时，她的天使之翼就会燃烧起来，燃烧翅膀获得 $(orisha_max_stacks) 层堆叠。堆叠每秒减少 1 层。每剩余一层，灼热射线的伤害就会提升 $(orisha_flaming_buff_base_amount)% 加 $(orisha_flaming_buff_stack_amount)%（加算）。到达 0 层时，她的翅膀和伤害加成会移除。每当奥瑞莎被击杀时，堆叠会重置为 $(orisha_max_stacks)，但衰减率会增加 $(decay_amount)%（乘算）。

tipText.original: When Orisha uses her ultimate her Wings burst aflame, increasing damage, kills further increase damage but make the wings burn out more quickly.
tipText.display: 奥瑞莎使用杀招时，她的翅膀会燃烧起来，使伤害提高。击杀可以进一步提高伤害，但会使翅膀更快熄火。

description.desc: The effect of Flaming Wings is increased by $(amount)%.
燃烧翅膀技能的效果提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Orisha focuses on the power of her Flaming Wings.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎专注于她提高燃烧翅膀的力量。

description.desc: Flaming Wings starts with $(amount)% more stacks.
燃烧翅膀初始多获得 $(amount)% 堆叠层数

specializationDescription.original: Orisha focuses on keeping her Flaming Wings ablaze.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎专注于维持燃烧翅膀的火焰。

tipText.original: Orisha has a strong connection with Vlahnya, they strongly buff each others abilities.
tipText.display: 奥瑞莎与弗拉希娜关系紧密，互相使对方的技能大幅强化。

description.desc: The effect of Bardic Connection is increased by $(amount)%.
诗歌纽带技能的效果提升 $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Orisha increases her contribution to Bardic Connection.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎提高她对诗歌纽带的贡献。

description.desc: Orisha's damage is increased by $(amount)% for each Champion affected by Bardic Connection (stacking multiplicatively). Vlahnya's Enthralling Performance buff always applies to Orisha, and Orisha counts as adjacent to her for the Bass portion.
每有一位被诗歌纽带技能所影响的勇士，奥瑞莎的伤害提升 $(amount)%（以乘算方式堆叠）。弗拉希娜的醉人表演增益始终对奥里夏生效，并且奥里夏始终被算作与弗拉希娜相邻，以获得醉人表演：贝斯技能的加成

specializationDescription.original: Orisha increases her bond with Vlahnya.
specializationDescription.display: 奥瑞莎强化她与弗拉希娜的联系。

description.desc: Whenever there is a boss monster on the screen, Orisha's Flaming Wings and Bardic Connection abilities are increased by $(amount)%.
屏幕中有一名首领怪物时，奥瑞莎的燃烧翅膀和诗歌纽带技能效果提升 $(amount)%

description.original: You want to end up like the half-orc nursing his sore head in the corner?
description.display: 你是想跟角落里那位鼻青脸肿的半兽人一样的下场吗？

description.original: Get behind me and close your eyes!
description.display: 快躲到我身后闭上双眼！
我就是为这一刻而生的。

description.original: Vlahnya always has our backs. Except for when she doesn't.
description.display: 弗拉希娜一直都很靠得住。除非是在她不靠谱的时候。

description.original: Just hold the tempo and we'll be celebrating soon!
description.display: 保持着这种节奏，胜利就在眼前了！

description.original: This is it! Let's hit 'em with all we've got!
description.display: 就看这一刻了！全力爆发吧！

description.original: Didn't see that one coming, did you?
We find ourselves in disarray, that stupid hollyphant always leaves us this way!
description.display: 我们团队落得人仰马翻，都怪圣飞象丢下我们不管！

character_sheet_details.backstory: A glamorous diva possessed by a Deva, with an inciting voice and gleaming pristine robes, Orisha is the lead vocalist of the Sirens of the Realms, her found family. She is of such great renown, that she needs no last name.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Orisha's ultimate initiates a buff to her normal attack, each kill she gets increases the buff while also increasing the speed at which the buffs expires. She also has a special connection with Vlahnya, each is better together than apart.

character_sheet_details.backstory: 奥瑞莎是被天人附身的迷人女歌手。她拥有绝佳的嗓音和发光的纯洁长袍，是“海妖国度”的首席主唱。她的名气大到甚至都不需要姓氏。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 奥瑞莎的杀招为她的普通攻击提供一个增益效果，每次击杀都会增强该增益，同时也会提高该增益失效的速度。她与弗拉希娜也有特殊联系，这两人在一起的效果会比分开更好。

original.description: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.
original.long_description: Orisha summons rays of fire and hurls them at multiple random targets.
